source: DealOrNoDeal (Lewis et al. 2017, MIT license, via stanfordnlp/cocoa)

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: hello chap . i would be much obliged if i could get the two books and 2 hats .

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: that's the only thing of value . balls are useless to me . how about i take two books and 1 hat , you take the rest ?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: how about we each get 1 book then since we both want them . 1 of each thing ? 1 book , 1 ball , 1 hat ?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: ball is useless to me . . no points . can you propose something better ? i'm ok with one book , two hats ?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: okay . so then i will take 1 book and the 2 balls ? and you the 2 hats ?
